targetTranslation: that/those (pointing to something far away) (referring to ءَايٰتُ - verses)
ayahArabic: الٓر تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Alif, Lām, Rā. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahArabic: الٓر تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Alif, Lām, Rā. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahArabic: الٓر تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Alif, Lām, Rā. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

ayahArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

ayahArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

ayahArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

ayahArabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.

targetTranslation: leave them! (command to let them be, connected to يَأْكُلُوا۟)
ayahArabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.

targetTranslation: let them eat (after ذَرْهُمْ - leave them)
ayahArabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.

ayahArabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.

ayahArabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.

targetTranslation: any community (possessed by something in أَجَلَهَا)
ayahArabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.

ayahArabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.

ayahArabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.

targetTranslation: was sent down repeatedly (referring to الذِّكْرُ - the reminder)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.

ayahArabic: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"

ayahArabic: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"

ayahArabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and they [i.e., the disbelievers] would not then be reprieved.

ayahArabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and they [i.e., the disbelievers] would not then be reprieved.

targetTranslation: those who are given time (predicate of كانوا)
ayahArabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and they [i.e., the disbelievers] would not then be reprieved.

targetTranslation: we (subject of نَزَّلْنَا - we sent down)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحٰفِظُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who sent down the message [i.e., the Qur’ān], and indeed, We will be its guardian.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحٰفِظُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who sent down the message [i.e., the Qur’ān], and indeed, We will be its guardian.

targetTranslation: we sent (followed by مِن قَبْلِكَ - before you)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muḥammad], among the sects of the former peoples.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muḥammad], among the sects of the former peoples.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muḥammad], among the sects of the former peoples.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.

ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Thus do We insert it [i.e., denial] into the hearts of the criminals.

ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Thus do We insert it [i.e., denial] into the hearts of the criminals.

targetTranslation: they believe/trust (لَا - they do not believe in it)
ayahArabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.

ayahArabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.

targetTranslation: the established way/practice (subject of خَلَتْ - has passed)
ayahArabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,

targetTranslation: a door (object of فَتَحْنَا - we opened)
ayahArabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,

targetTranslation: it (fem) was blocked/covered intensely (referring to أَبْصٰرُنَا - our eyes)
ayahArabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahEnglish: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahArabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahEnglish: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahArabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahEnglish: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahArabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahEnglish: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahArabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahEnglish: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّاهَا لِلنَّاظِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّاهَا لِلنَّاظِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.

ayahArabic: وَحَفِظْنٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allāh]

targetTranslation: a rebellious one (being described by رَّجِيمٍ)
ayahArabic: وَحَفِظْنٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allāh]

ayahArabic: وَحَفِظْنٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allāh]

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.

targetTranslation: we stretched it (referring to الأرض/the Earth)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرٰزِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرٰزِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahArabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيٰحَ لَوٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخٰزِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.

targetTranslation: water (as the object being sent down)
ayahArabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيٰحَ لَوٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخٰزِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.

ayahArabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيٰحَ لَوٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخٰزِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوٰرِثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

targetTranslation: he gathers/will gather them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.

targetTranslation: dry clay that makes a sound when tapped (owned, after مِن)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahEnglish: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahEnglish: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahEnglish: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.

targetTranslation: he said (subject of لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ - to the angels)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

targetTranslation: your Lord (who said to the angels)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

targetTranslation: of a clay that rings (when struck)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

targetTranslation: something that was shaped/made smooth (describing حَمَإٍ - black mud)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

targetTranslation: I fashioned him/it completely (refers to آدَمَ/Adam mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سٰجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahArabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

targetTranslation: all together (describing the angels in فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ)
ayahArabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

targetTranslation: Satan (as the subject of أَبَىٰٓ - he refused)
ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he refused to be with those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he refused to be with those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he refused to be with those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except Iblees; he refused to be with those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

targetTranslation: of dry clay that makes a ringing sound when struck (possessed by مِن)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

targetTranslation: of black mud (describing what صَلْصٰلٍ was made from)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

targetTranslation: of altered black mud that has been perfectly shaped/molded (describing حَمَإٍ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Then depart from it, for indeed, you are expelled.

targetTranslation: an outcast, one who is driven away (description of إِنَّكَ - indeed you are)
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Then depart from it, for indeed, you are expelled.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

ayahArabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
ayahEnglish: Until the Day of the time well-known."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all

targetTranslation: you led me astray (said by Iblis to Allah)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all

targetTranslation: all together (as the object being acted upon by لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will surely mislead them)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all

ayahArabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
ayahEnglish: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰذَا صِرٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰذَا صِرٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰذَا صِرٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.

ayahEnglish: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."

ayahArabic: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ

ayahEnglish: [O Muḥammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful,

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,

ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

targetTranslation: he turns himself around (in negative command with لا)
ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

ayahArabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.

ayahArabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.

ayahArabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.

ayahArabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.

ayahArabic: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the people of the city came rejoicing.

targetTranslation: they seek good news for themselves (referring to the people of the city)
ayahArabic: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the people of the city came rejoicing.

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
ayahEnglish: And fear Allāh and do not disgrace me."

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
ayahEnglish: And fear Allāh and do not disgrace me."

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"

targetTranslation: and did not? (questioning the people who said قَالُوٓا۟)
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."

targetTranslation: their state of intoxication/confusion (while they wander blindly in يَعْمَهُونَ)
ayahArabic: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: By your life, [O Muḥammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.

ayahArabic: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: By your life, [O Muḥammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.

ayahArabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.

targetTranslation: its high part (acted on by جَعَلْنَا/we made)
ayahArabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.

ayahArabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.

targetTranslation: stones (as the object being rained down)
ayahArabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.

ayahArabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, they [i.e., those cities] are [situated] on an established road.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] were [also] wrongdoers,

ayahArabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] were [also] wrongdoers,

ayahArabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.

targetTranslation: he strongly denied/rejected (أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ denied ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did the companions of al-Ḥijr [i.e., the Thamūd] deny the messengers.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did the companions of al-Ḥijr [i.e., the Thamūd] deny the messengers.

ayahArabic: وَءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ ءَايٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.

targetTranslation: those who turn away (predicate of كَانُوا)
ayahArabic: وَءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ ءَايٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.

targetTranslation: they carve/are carving (from the mountains houses)
ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.

targetTranslation: houses (as objects being carved from mountains)
ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.

ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.

targetTranslation: those who enter morning time (describes when الصَّيْحَةُ seized them)
ayahArabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: But the shriek seized them at early morning,

ayahArabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.

targetTranslation: they earn/are earning (referring to what they were doing in كَانُوا)
ayahArabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَءَاتِيَةٌ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
ayahEnglish: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.

ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَءَاتِيَةٌ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
ayahEnglish: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّاقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّاقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنٰكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly given you, [O Muḥammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur’ān.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنٰكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly given you, [O Muḥammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur’ān.

ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

targetTranslation: your two eyes (object of لَا تَمُدَّنَّ - do not extend)
ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

targetTranslation: that which (connects to مَتَّعْنَا - we gave enjoyment)
ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahArabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahArabic: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -

ayahArabic: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators

targetTranslation: those who (referring to the people who divided the Quran into parts)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahEnglish: Who have made the Qur’ān into portions.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahEnglish: Who have made the Qur’ān into portions.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahEnglish: Who have made the Qur’ān into portions.

targetTranslation: all of them together (object of لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ - we will surely question them)
ayahArabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all

ayahArabic: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: About what they used to do.

ayahArabic: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: About what they used to do.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.

targetTranslation: we were sufficient for you (object of إِنَّا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا كَفَيْنٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

targetTranslation: they make/set/place (referring to those who in ٱلَّذِينَ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

targetTranslation: a god (object of يَجْعَلُونَ - they take/make)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

targetTranslation: your chest (subject of يَضِيقُ - becomes tight)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

targetTranslation: your Lord (possessed by حَمْدِ in بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ)
ayahArabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].

ayahArabic: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
ayahEnglish: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty [i.e., death].

ayahArabic: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
ayahEnglish: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty [i.e., death].
